TOP SECRET // SCI // VIGIL // NOFORN
AFTER-ACTION REPORT
RED SCORPION
MISSION SUCCESS
2 JAN 2029 — Sana'a, Yemen

Platforms: CV-22B Osprey, MH-60L DAP, technical vehicles

Origin: CIA Riyadh Station, Saudi Arabia | COVERT | 300 personnel
Platforms: MH-60M Black Hawk, MH-47G Chinook, RHIB assault craft, SDV Mk 8 Mod 1
INTELLIGENCE BASIS
INTEL COVERAGE100% (9 of 9 fields collected)
[HUMINT] Target Identity: High-value target confirmed: The Black Sword operational leader in Sana'a. Vigil facial recognition match from surveillance drone footage. Confidence: 95%.
[SIGINT] Target Location: Primary cell operating from residential area in eastern Sana'a. SIGINT confirms activity at coordinates.
[ISR] Pattern of Life: Armored columns observed moving toward staging areas under cover of darkness. Satellite imagery confirms 40+ vehicles.
[ISR] Security Detail Assessment: 15-20 personnel, rotating shifts. At least 2 crew-served weapons.
[SIGINT] Target Network & Associates: Target network spans Sana'a and 2 neighboring regions. Communications analysis reveals a 6-person security detail and 4 logistics coordinators.
[IMAGERY] Escape Routes & Safe Houses: Target has a fallback location in the mountains 200km from Sana'a. Road access limited to single track. Vigil recommends blocking force on approach route.
[ISR] Collateral Damage Assessment: Low collateral: target compound is isolated, 3km from nearest civilian structure. Engagement options include precision strike and ground assault.
[HUMINT] Command Authority: Theater commander: Lt. Gen. identified via SIGINT. Reports directly to Defense Minister. Aggressive reputation. Known risk-taker.
[SIGINT] Target Communications: Dark web forum for strategic direction. Tactical comms via encrypted app with ephemeral messaging. Key rotation every 72h.
VIGIL ASSESSMENT
SELECTED OPTIONVIGIL RECOMMENDATION (Confidence: 95%)
Operator followed Vigil recommendation.
OPERATIONAL TIMELINE
D-2 0702Z
Vigil issued kill/capture authorization for HAWK, senior The Black Sword operative, located in Sana'a, Yemen. CIA SAD/SOG (Middle East) assigned. 14-man kill team. Transit: 1.5 hours. Vigil confidence: 95%. Target identification: High-value target confirmed: The Black Sword operational leader in Sana'a. Vigil facial recognition match from surveillance drone footage. Confidence: 95%..
D-1 0758Z
Target surveillance package activated. Pattern of life: Armored columns observed moving toward staging areas under cover of darkness. Satellite imagery confirms 40+ vehicles.. Positive ID established via SIGINT intercept: Dark web forum for strategic direction. Tactical comms via encrypted app with ephemeral messaging. Key rotation every 72h.. Target network: Target network spans Sana'a and 2 neighboring regions. Communications analysis reveals a 6-person security detail and 4 logistics coordinators.. Known escape routes: Target has a fallback location in the mountains 200km from Sana'a. Road access limited to single track. Vigil recommends blocking force on approach route..
D+0 0140Z
Team FROST staged at forward position. Clear with high winds, 35kt gusting to 50kt. Primary weapons: cash reserves (operational funds), Non-attributable weapons. ISR confirms target at known associate's compound. Intel coverage: 100%.
D+0 0548Z
Crawled through 80m of irrigation ditch to reach the compound's blind spot. NVGs showed two sentries on the north gate.
D+0 0653Z
All teams in position. Overwatch confirms 15-20 personnel, rotating shifts. At least 2 crew-served weapons.. HAWK positively identified on thermal. "We have eyes on JACKPOT."
D+0 0700Z
"Execute." Shotgun breach on the lock. First man kicked the remnants clear. Rifle up, IR laser cutting through the dust.
D+0 0701Z
Ground floor was a maze of narrow corridors. Point man moved in a combat glide, muzzle tracking every doorway. First contact — hostile stepped into the hall carrying an ammunition can. Didn't even see the team. Two suppressed rounds. He went down without a sound. Team stepped over the body and pushed forward.
D+0 0702Z
Stairwell. Fragmentation grenade from above. Team pulled back. Waited. Grenade detonated on empty landing. Team surged up the stairs, clearing by sectors.
D+0 0703Z
"Overwatch, I have a squirter — one pax east side, moving to a vehicle." "Roger, tracking." Pause. "He's got a weapon. Engaging." Single crack of the .300 Win Mag. "Target down. No movement."
D+0 0704Z
Upper floor. First door — locked from inside. Flashbang through the gap above the door frame. BANG. Kick. Two hostiles, ears bleeding, stumbling. Near man got two rounds before he could orient. Far man tripped over a chair trying to reach his rifle. Operator closed the distance and put him on the ground. Flex-cuffed.
D+0 0706Z
Target room. HAWK identified by the IR strobe on the helmet cam. Target reached for a weapon under the desk. Point man didn't hesitate — 4 rounds center mass. Target slumped forward. "JACKPOT is EKIA." Biometric confirmation initiated — fingerprints and facial match: positive.
D+0 0712Z
Biometric enrollment on all KIA and detained personnel. Fingerprints, iris scans, DNA swabs. Cross-referenced with the database in real-time.
D+0 0725Z
SSE complete. Compound secured. 9 hostile KIA total. 3 detained. All team members accounted for.
D+0 0842Z
Maritime extraction by submarine. HAWK's remains recovered for DNA confirmation. Zero friendly casualties.
STRATEGIC ASSESSMENT
HVT elimination operation RED SCORPION achieved primary objective. HAWK — senior The Black Sword operative — confirmed EKIA with biometric verification. Sensitive materials recovered. The Black Sword's leadership structure in Sana'a decapitated.
OPERATIONAL IMPACT
VIABILITY+2% (now 76%)
INTELLIGENCE+10 (now 22)
Operator adhered to Vigil-recommended course of action. Mission success validates system analysis. Viability standing reinforced. Pre-mission confidence was assessed at 95% — well within acceptable parameters.

intelFields.value: Cell using encrypted messaging application with rotating keys. Pattern analysis reveals daily check-in at 0200 local.

intelFields.label: Network Topology
intelFields.value: Distributed network spanning 3 data centers. Redundant path architecture.

intelFields.label: Attribution Confidence
intelFields.value: LOW — false flag indicators present. Multiple attribution hypotheses.

intelFields.label: Vulnerability Assessment
intelFields.value: Critical: exposed management interface on port 4443. No MFA enforced.

intelFields.label: Access Vectors
intelFields.value: Primary: insider access via recruited agent with network credentials.

intelFields.label: Counter-Intrusion Risk
intelFields.value: Incident response team on retainer — expect 4-6h response if detected.

intelFields.label: Target & Intent
intelFields.value: Assessment: high-profile attack on critical infrastructure in Cincinnati, United States. Specific target selection phase underway.

intelFields.label: Operator Communications
intelFields.value: Communications via dead drops and courier network. Electronic footprint minimal. One encrypted VHF channel identified.

intelFields.label: Asset Last Known Position
intelFields.value: Asset's final transmission from Sana'a: "Cover blown. Being followed. Going dark." Position approximately 2km from nearest extraction point.

intelFields.label: Compromise Vector
intelFields.value: Vigil assessment: compromise originated from technical surveillance. Host nation CI detected asset's regular meetings with case officer via pattern-of-life analysis.

intelFields.label: Hostile CI Activity Level
intelFields.value: Hostile CI running a full surveillance grid in Sana'a. Vigil estimates 30-50 officers deployed. Electronic surveillance net covering 10km radius from last known position.

intelFields.label: Exfiltration Routes
intelFields.value: Primary exfil route compromised — hostile CI checkpoints on highway north. Alternative: riverboat extraction 30km downstream from Sana'a. Requires coordination with local asset.

intelFields.label: Asset Condition & Status
intelFields.value: Asset has gone dark but emergency beacon activated 6 hours ago. Assessed as evading on foot. Cover identity still partially intact — has not been publicly identified.

intelFields.label: Cover Identity Status
intelFields.value: Cover identity fully compromised. Asset's real name, photograph, and agency affiliation known to hostile CI. No viable cover for continued operations in Yemen.

intelFields.label: Safe House Network
intelFields.value: Safe house network status: 2 locations available. Nearest is 4km from asset's last known position. Route assessment: moderate risk.

intelFields.label: Operational Damage Assessment
intelFields.value: Full damage assessment will require 6-8 weeks. Initial review confirms compromise of classified collection methods and technical capabilities. Impact: SEVERE.

intelFields.label: Organization Location
intelFields.value: Organization headquarters confirmed in Bab el-Mandeb Strait, International Waters. Secondary operations in 3 neighboring countries.

intelFields.label: Transport Identification
intelFields.value: Container ship MSC Valencia, Liberian flag. History of sanctions evasion.

intelFields.label: Cargo/Shipment Intel
intelFields.value: Manifest inconsistent with observed loading. Containers do not match documentation.

intelFields.label: Route Prediction
intelFields.value: Pattern analysis suggests diversion to waypoint off coast — possible at-sea transfer.

intelFields.label: Criminal Network Map
intelFields.value: Social network analysis identifies 3 key facilitators. Recommend targeting.

intelFields.label: Leadership Identification
intelFields.value: Leader positively identified via biometric match. Known to intelligence community.

intelFields.label: Financial Flow Analysis
intelFields.value: Front companies in International Waters generating legitimate revenue to fund operations. Shell corporation network spans 6 jurisdictions.

intelFields.label: Cell Location
intelFields.value: Confirmed safehouse in Kabul industrial district. Second location suspected 12km northwest.

intelFields.label: Cell Structure
intelFields.value: Lone actor with remote facilitation from overseas network. Single known address.

intelFields.label: Member Count
intelFields.value: Minimum 4 confirmed members via biometric identification. True cell size may be 8-10.

intelFields.label: Attack Planning Intel
intelFields.value: Source reporting: cell leadership has set operational deadline at 1-2 weeks.

intelFields.label: Weapons Cache Location
intelFields.value: Vehicle-borne IED components located at secondary location.

intelFields.label: Leadership Identification
intelFields.value: Leader positively identified via biometric match. Known to intelligence community.

intelFields.label: Support & Financing Network
intelFields.value: Logistics support from diaspora community. Couriers identified.

intelFields.label: Internal Communications
intelFields.value: Satellite phone intercepts indicate overseas handler. Local comms use rotating prepaid SIMs purchased in bulk.

intelFields.label: Target & Intent Assessment
intelFields.value: Intent confirmed: sabotage operation against energy infrastructure in Rome, Italy. Operatives deploying from Kabul.

media.headline: FBI disrupts plot in Austin; press conference scheduled
media.body: Federal authorities in Austin have concluded a major operation targeting a domestic security threat. The operation involved FBI Field Office #1, FBI Field Office #2, FBI Field Office #3 in a coordinated response. The FBI stated that all objectives were met and there were no civilian casualties. The investigation is ongoing.
